title: Corporations organized after passage of law
doc_html:
§71.  Corporations organized after passage of law

These rights of expropriation conferred by R.S. 45:64 shall extend to corporations organized under the laws of this state after August 1, 1916, provided the estimates of cost of construction shall exceed three million dollars.
doc_text:
§71.  Corporations organized after passage of law
These rights of expropriation conferred by R.S. 45:64 shall extend to corporations organized under the laws of this state after August 1, 1916, provided the estimates of cost of construction shall exceed three million dollars.
